title: Owner Decision Reference
description: Common v1 reference to an owner decision, owner review, or owner sign-off.
$comment: Source: MASTER-01, MASTER-05, MASTER-07, and TECH-10 require owner decisions/sign-off to have scope, evidence, audit, time, approver or authority, and trace to gate/release decisions.

decision.description: Decision value or conclusion. Use a domain-specific enum only when a later source document defines one.

scope.description: Decision scope. Owner sign-off must not be used outside its scope.

evidenceId.description: Evidence package or evidence item supporting the decision.
